title: GEEPAS Steam Iron | Clothes Dry & Steam Press | 40s Fast Heat-Up, Vertical Steaming | Ceramic Soleplate & Adjustable Temperature| 220ml Water Tank with 0.8g/Steam Output | 2 Year Warranty 2400W Black
features: ✅ POWERFUL 2400W PERFORMANCE, FAST HEAT-UP – The Geepas Steam irons deliver quick 40 seconds heat-up and efficient ironing. It ensures faster crease removal, making ironing effortless and saving time on busy mornings.

✅ CERAMIC SOLEPLATE – The flat iron is equipped with a ceramic soleplate, iron steamer glides seamlessly over all fabric types without snagging or burning. The thick soleplate ensures even heat distribution for a professional finish.

✅ ADJUSTABLE TEMPERATURE, VARIABLE STEAM CONTROL – Lightweight steam irons feature a customizable thermostat dial to suit fabrics like cotton, silk, linen, wool, and synthetics. Choose from continuous steam (25g/min) or steam burst (0.8g/min) for stubborn creases.

✅ LARGE 220ML WATER TANK, POWERFUL STEAM OUTPUT – Equipped with a 220ml water tank, this steam iron ensures long ironing sessions. Delivers a continuous steam flow of 25g/min and a steam boost of 0.8g/min, effectively removing stubborn creases for crisp, professional results.

✅ SAFETY & SELF-CLEANING FUNCTION – The heat-resistant, shockproof ergonomic handle ensures a secure grip, making ironing comfortable and safe. The built-in self-cleaning function helps prevent limescale buildup, maintaining optimal performance and extending the iron’s lifespan.
description: Product Description POWERFUL STEAM BOOST Tackles even the most stubborn creases and wrinkles. PRECISE TEMPERATURE CONTROL Achieve perfect ironing results on all fabric types. CERAMIC COATED SOLEPLATE The ceramic soleplate 220*116 will ensure a smooth and soft glide of the iron over the fabric. CONVENIENT HANDLE The handle repeats the shape of the hand, which makes it convenient to hold it for the entire ironing. 220ML WATER TANK Large water tank capacity, Filling it completely, you can iron a large number of clothes without adding extra water. ANTI DRIP & ANTI CALC Anti-drip prevents staining of clothes, whilst anti-calc protects against lime scale with a self-cleaning button to help flush out any build-up. MULTI FUCTION IRONING The iron has Multi Iron Modes, Wet/Dry, Steam burst, Steam & Vertical Steam Function. SPRAY NOZZLE It makes the fabric moist, this is followed by the heat, and it makes the entire surface even.

specifications_table.Special Features: ‎Anti Drip & Calc Function, Continuous Steam Technology, Spray & Steam Burst Setting, Steam Boost Function, Temperature Control
